name: blikka
description: Open-source SaaS for running photo marathons (uploads, validation, jury review, voting, and exports).

scripts.check-aws-account: BLIKKA_AWS_ACCOUNT_ID=${BLIKKA_AWS_ACCOUNT_ID:-$(grep -m1 '^BLIKKA_AWS_ACCOUNT_ID=' .env 2>/dev/null | cut -d'=' -f2-)}; if [ -z "$BLIKKA_AWS_ACCOUNT_ID" ]; then echo 'ℹ️ Skipping AWS account check (set BLIKKA_AWS_ACCOUNT_ID to enforce)'; exit 0; fi; if [ "$(aws sts get-caller-identity --query 'Account' --output text 2>/dev/null)" = "$BLIKKA_AWS_ACCOUNT_ID" ]; then echo '✅ Correct AWS account'; else echo '❌ Wrong AWS account, aborting.' && exit 1; fi
scripts.dev:sst: bun run check-aws-account && bunx sst dev --stage development
scripts.deploy:prod: bun run check-aws-account && bunx sst deploy --stage production
